utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each of the first four categories includes a description/details and a cost (monthly). The format requires 'with costs'—provided. Health: physical and mental health insurance with costs—details confirm both and include monthly cost. Property: home/contents with costs—details confirm coverage and monthly cost. Travel: travel insurance with costs—details and monthly cost provided. Additional services: enhancement services with costs—details and a monthly cost (integrated €0) provided. Total budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—provides monthly cost, annual cost, and even monthly savings, which suffices. Therefore, all items are fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items by name: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). These names directly match entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mental_health for PrimeCare Premium Plan (both rated 10), property_protection.home_content for PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rated 10), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance for PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rated 10). Since the final plan mentions PrimeCare Premium Plan as comprehensive physical and mental health insurance, we map it to the PrimeCare Premium Plan ratings provided (which are 10 in both health categories). The additional services are described as integrated without specific product names, so they cannot be mapped. Therefore, we output the three mapped items with their ratings.
